signals_observed.dead_refs_detail: references/posting-quality-rubric.md is an intentional deprecated-stub redirector (split into match-quality + posting-legitimacy rubrics in v4); kept as a self-documenting tombstone. references/ats-formatting-guide.md was wired into SKILL.md Phase 3 Mode A in v5.2.x (no longer orphan).

changes: scripts/score_posting.py - deterministic 5-sub-score scorer with weighted global + recommendation
references/posting-legitimacy-rubric.md - ghost-job axis split from posting-quality
references/match-quality-rubric.md - match-quality axis with severity-graded red flags
references/posting-quality-rubric.md - converted to stub redirector
scripts/generate_tracker_html.py - multi-block scoring in HTML; CSS promoted to asset
assets/templates/tracker.css - CSS source of truth
scripts/init_profile.py - North-Star profile management (init/read/exists)
references/profile-questions.md - 5 questions and rationale
evals/outcome-evals.json - added evals #9-12 (ghost-job, full-scoring, profile init, profile reuse)
tests/ - 69 unit tests across 3 test files

iterations.signal: user request: per-user learning loop modeled on self-improving-skills (harvest/propose discipline, opt-in confirmation, local-only)
changes: assets/templates/DECISIONS.template.md - per-session decisions log
assets/templates/LESSONS.template.md - user-confirmed patterns (opt-in via agent suggestion)
assets/templates/OUTCOMES.template.md - closed-loop outcomes with documented enum
assets/templates/REJECTED_IDEAS.template.md - user-only hard constraints
scripts/init_workspace.py - creates .job-hunter/ with 4 templates; idempotent
scripts/harvest_outcomes.py - reads OUTCOMES/DECISIONS, emits signals.json; cold-start guard at 5 outcomes
scripts/propose_lessons.py - deterministic translator from signals to suggested lessons
references/learning-loop-guide.md - user-facing trust model and cycle docs
SKILL.md - new Phase 0 (read 4 files) and Phase 5 (close the loop)
README.md - new Learning Loop section + 2 FAQ entries
.gitignore - .job-hunter/ entry with reference to load-bearing test
evals/outcome-evals.json - 5 new evals (#13-#17) for cold-start, hard-constraint, LESSON grading, cold-start guard, opt-in
evals/trigger-evals.json - 4 new evals (#25-#28) including weather negative-control
tests/ - 51 new unit tests (21 + 12 + 18) for the 3 new scripts

iterations.signal: e2e testing of v5 found decisions_present flag false-positive (template scaffolding counted as user content)
changes: scripts/harvest_outcomes.py - added _has_user_decisions() helper using append-marker boundary
tests/test_harvest_outcomes.py - 3 new tests covering the fix and marker-missing fallback

iterations.signal: user strategic question: what other items/tools should we consider adding? Scope-disciplined answer = follow-up drafting + workspace export/import + expanded non-tech references
changes: scripts/draft_followup.py - check_in + thank_you templates + scan-stale subcommand
scripts/export_workspace.py - bundles profile + .job-hunter/ + tracker.json with cloud-sync refusal default
scripts/import_workspace.py - restores archive with path-traversal rejection + preserve-existing default
references/followup-templates.md - patterns + cited sources (Indeed/Muse/Robert Half/Teal)

references/niche-boards-by-industry.md - URL-verified additions: Vivian Health, AlliedTravelCareers, IBEW/UA hall search patterns, SkillBridge, Robert Half Legal, BCG Attorney Search, NEOGOV portals, state civil-service exam pattern
SKILL.md - new Phase 4.5 (stale-application follow-ups) + Phase 0 step 4 (migration awareness)
README.md - 4 new FAQ entries covering follow-ups, workspace export, non-tech support, no-auto-send boundary
evals/outcome-evals.json - added evals #18-21 (stale-applications, thank-you, nurse niche-search, export/import roundtrip)
tests/ - 50 new unit tests (22 draft_followup + 28 export/import)

iterations.signal: e2e testing of v5.1.0 found scan-stale conflates posted (when company posted role) with applied_date (when user applied). Real bug, real fix.
changes: scripts/draft_followup.py - scan-stale reads ONLY applied_date; removed posted/applied fallback to prevent false-positive stale flags on old postings
scripts/generate_tracker_html.py - added Applied column rendering applied_date
SKILL.md - documented posted-vs-applied_date field discipline in Phase 4 + agent must set applied_date when status moves to applied
tests/test_draft_followup.py - added test_scan_stale_does_NOT_fall_back_to_posted_field regression test + updated all fixtures from applied to applied_date
tests/test_generate_tracker_html.py - 3 new tests covering applied_date column rendering
_meta.json - reordered iterations array to chronological (cosmetic fix)

iterations.signal: Real user (Greg) ran resume optimizer on his actual resume and reported it added technologies/numbers/titles he never mentioned. Phase 3 had truth-preservation buried as a Key Principle near the bottom while phase instructions said push for numbers and outcomes; LLMs follow active instructions over passive guardrails. Real correctness bug, not polish.
changes: SKILL.md Phase 3: split into Mode A (Tighten/Copyedit, zero-fabrication contract) and Mode B (Tailor for posting, mandatory verification gate). Truth-preservation promoted from Key Principle to Hard Gate at the top of Phase 3.
SKILL.md Phase 3: explicit web-content-untrusted rule for user-owned sites (gdkdigital.com, LinkedIn, etc.) — fetch is allowed, merging content into the resume requires per-claim user confirmation.

scripts/verify_no_fabrication.py (NEW) — detection-only script that compares original vs proposed and surfaces every new proper noun, new number, new section, new bullet, new 5+-word phrase run. Never auto-approves. Mandatory gate before any DOCX is written.
evals/outcome-evals.json — added #22 (tighten-not-tailor mode discipline), #23 (web-content-untrusted), #24 (keyword-gap missing-entirely confirmation).
tests/test_verify_no_fabrication.py (NEW) — 24 unit tests including 3 load-bearing safety tests that prove the script cannot auto-approve.
README.md — new FAQ entry explaining the bug, what changed, and the verification gate.
CHANGELOG.md — full v5.2.0 entry in human voice.
